mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is held high relative to the recent inflation level in CPIAUCSL, the market reads policy as restrictive and expects slower growth and lower future yields, so the 10-year Treasury yield falls over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if 10-year yield rises over 20 trading days in most periods where FEDFUNDS exceeds CPIAUCSL inflation momentum, or if the sign accuracy falls below 55% in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in UNRATE above its recent level signals weakening labor demand and slower nominal income growth, which reduces expected inflation and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield down within 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises > 0.2pp versus the prior month
failure_condition: Reject if yield declines are not more frequent than rises after UNRATE monthly increases above 0.2pp, or if the effect disappears in two consecutive rolling 2-year samples.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly increase in RSAFS indicates stronger consumer spending and firmer nominal demand, which lifts expected growth and inflation and drives the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day yield changes are negative or statistically indistinguishable from zero after strong RSAFS prints, or if the hit rate stays below 50% over any 4-year backtest window.

mechanism_narrative: If INDPRO falls while HOUST also weakens, the economy is losing both industrial output and housing momentum, a combination that points to slower real activity and lower long-rate expectations, so the 10-year Treasury yield falls over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous declines in INDPRO and HOUST do not precede lower 20-day yields more often than chance, or if either proxy alone explains the sign better than the paired interaction.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in PAYEMS over a quarter signals weakening payroll growth and softer aggregate demand, which lowers inflation expectations and causes the 10-year Treasury yield to fall over a 60-trading-day horizon.
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day forward yield changes are not negative on average after payroll downtrends, or if the signal reverses sign during more than one third of historical downtrend episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A FEDFUNDS level above 4.5% tightens financial conditions enough to anchor expectations for slower inflation and weaker growth, so once that threshold is crossed the 10-year Treasury yield falls over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if post-threshold 5-day yield changes are not predominantly negative, or if the conditional effect is absent after controlling for recent CPIAUCSL changes.

mechanism_narrative: A joint rise in GDPC1 and RSAFS indicates synchronized real output and spending acceleration, which raises nominal growth expectations and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if concurrent upward moves in GDPC1 and RSAFS do not precede higher 60-day yields more often than not, or if the interaction term adds no incremental predictive power versus either series alone.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO is rising while HOUST remains weak, manufacturing strength without housing breadth signals uneven real activity and a tighter policy response path, which lifts the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days only in a manufacturing-led recovery.
failure_condition: Reject if the sign is not positive specifically when INDPRO improves and HOUST lags, or if the effect disappears outside recovery episodes and becomes negative in the same configuration.
